## Runtime.RuntimeUsage.tryGetModifiedVersion() method

Attempts to get the modified version, returning a Result.

**Signature:**

```typescript
tryGetModifiedVersion(): Result<RuntimeVersion | undefined>;
```
**Returns:**

Result&lt;[RuntimeVersion](./ts-chocolate.runtime.runtimeversion.md) \| undefined&gt;

Success with RuntimeVersion (or undefined if no modification), or Failure if resolution fails
